title: Andrea Manzo
text: Home * People * Andrea Manzo Andrea Manzo [1] Andrea Manzo , an Italian computer scientist and correspondence chess player, IM of the ICCF [2] . He is author of the Stockfish derivative ShashChess , and co-author of BrainLearn based on Brainfish , and was member of the Vitruvius team around Roberto Munter , as book author responsible for its opening book [3] .
